name: mralaminahamed/author-profile-blocks
description: A collection of powerful Gutenberg blocks for showcasing author profiles and team members using WordPress users.

scripts.zip: composer update --no-dev && cd .. && zip -r author-profile-blocks.zip author-profile-blocks/ -x 'author-profile-blocks/.git/*' 'author-profile-blocks/.github/*' 'author-profile-blocks/node_modules/*' 'author-profile-blocks/tests/*' 'author-profile-blocks/src/*' 'author-profile-blocks/resources/*' 'author-profile-blocks/*.lock' 'author-profile-blocks/*.zip' 'author-profile-blocks/.*' && mv author-profile-blocks.zip author-profile-blocks/
scripts.zip:wporg: composer update --no-dev && cd .. && zip -r author-profile-blocks.zip author-profile-blocks/ -x 'author-profile-blocks/.git/*' 'author-profile-blocks/.github/*' 'author-profile-blocks/node_modules/*' 'author-profile-blocks/tests/*' 'author-profile-blocks/src/*' 'author-profile-blocks/resources/*' 'author-profile-blocks/*.lock' 'author-profile-blocks/*.zip' 'author-profile-blocks/.*' && mv author-profile-blocks.zip author-profile-blocks/
